home.title: Investment Data for Thai Investors
home.subtitle: SET50 dividend yields updated every weekday, portfolio tracking, and morning investment news. Free, no ads.
home.feat1Desc: Live dividend yields for all 50 stocks. Sort, filter, and search instantly.
home.feat2Desc: Log your holdings, auto-calculate gain/loss, yield on cost, and annual dividend income.
home.feat3Desc: Curated from SET, Bank of Thailand, and top financial media. Ranked by relevance.
home.feat4Desc: Track current Thai bond IPOs with coupon rates, maturity dates, and ratings.
home.donateSubtitle: AC Invest is free for everyone. We are funded entirely by voluntary donations.
